menu.name: Cheese Burger
menu.description: Two juicy beef patties stacked with melted cheddar, fresh lettuce, tomato, red onion, and pickles on a toasted brioche bun.

menu.name: Fried Chicken Burger
menu.description: Golden fried chicken fillet layered with melted cheddar, fresh tomato, crisp lettuce, and creamy sauce on a soft sesame seed bun.

menu.name: Vegie Burger
menu.description: A hearty veggie patty loaded with fresh cucumber, tomato, red onion, bell pepper, and crisp lettuce on a toasted sesame bun.
